final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original architectural concept illustration for a futuristic sustainable city vision.

Style/medium: architectural concept illustration, futuristic utopian aesthetic, Syd Mead-inspired clean lines
Composition: wide establishing shot, slightly elevated angle showing floating structure and surrounding airspace
Subject: streamlined white building with flowing organic curves, suspended in mid-air, surrounded by small autonomous drones and holographic projection displays
Scene/backdrop: clean sky environment with visible solar arrays and wind turbines as clean energy infrastructure, distant city silhouette suggesting sustainable urban development
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight with subtle atmospheric haze, optimistic and aspirational mood
Color palette: dominant clean white and light gray for architecture, soft blue sky gradients, subtle green accents for sustainability elements, holographic cyan/magenta for projections
Materials/textures: smooth matte white surfaces with subtle panel lines, translucent holographic overlays, sleek metallic drone bodies
Avoid: dark dystopian tones, industrial decay, smog or pollution, generic sci-fi clutter, 8K stuffer words
